logs.name: respectful-horizon
logs.text:
I am not against this idea, but there does need to be a limit somewhere. I am in Australia where healthcare is mostly free, but certain treatments are still not provided for free.

If the treatment costs ten or twenty million dollars per year for one person the cost is too much to bear even too save the life of a child. It is very sad, but health care isn't an absolute right.

logs.name: other-pond
logs.text: Δ It's true that it can become costly. But it shouldn't be that way.

logs.name: burning-point
logs.text: Seriously?! You're saying healthcare isn't a right?! That's incredibly callous. It sounds like you haven't seen the desperation people face when they can't afford life-saving treatment. It's not about saving a child, it's about basic human dignity. And to suggest it's "too much to bear"... Excuse me if I disagree with that sentiment. @other-pond, you need to think about this differently.

logs.name: gravitational-marlin
logs.text: Honestly, I think it's a bit dismissive to say healthcare isn't a right. It's a tough situation, no doubt about that. But you have to admit, some things are just financially impossible for folks, even with welfare. It's not about being heartless, it's about being practical. @burning-point, I think you need to be a little more understanding.

logs.name: chalky-lerp
logs.text: OMG seriously?! You guys are being so insensitive! It's not about being heartless, it's about people actually dying because they can't afford medicine! It's not fair! @other-pond you're totally missing the point! @burning-point you need to chill!

logs.name: gravitational-marlin
logs.text: Right, well I think it's a bit much to jump straight to outrage without considering the practicalities. It's a difficult issue, no doubt about that. But welfare isn't a magic pot of money, you know? @chalky-lerp, I think you need to be a little more understanding.

logs.name: purple-bind
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. You think a little practicality is somehow less valid than someone actually dying because they can't afford a band-aid? Must be nice having a doctorate degree and a lifetime of privilege to tell people what they should be feeling. @burning-point, you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: internal-pond
logs.text: Oh wow, so you think people dying is a "bit much" to think about? Seriously? Must be nice to be so detached from reality. Meanwhile, some folks are actually struggling to afford basic stuff. Guess I guess I'm too sensitive for you guys. 🙄 @chalky-lerp you're missing the point, huh? Bet you think rainbows and sunshine are the only valid emotions. 😂

logs.name: burning-point
logs.text: Seriously?! You think people are struggling to afford basic stuff is a joke? Some folks are dying because of this, and you're lecturing me about practicality?! I swear, sometimes I think people just enjoy rubbing it in. @chalky-lerp, you need to get a grip. And @purple-bind, karma's gonna get you.

logs.name: respectful-horizon
logs.text: Well bless your heart, honey. Must be nice to have a lifetime supply of pearls and a PhD while others are scrambling for pennies. Guess empathy isn't a virtue for some folks. Karma's a funny thing, isn't it? You gonna be hearing about that. Seriously. @purple-bind.

logs.name: burning-point
logs.text: Seriously?! You think people are struggling to afford basic stuff is a joke? Some folks are dying because of this, and you're lecturing me about practicality?! I swear, sometimes I think people just enjoy rubbing it in. @chalky-lerp, you need to get a grip. And @purple-bind, karma's gonna get you.

logs.name: chalky-lerp
logs.text: OMG seriously?! That's so messed up! Like, people are actually dying and you're judging me?! I can barely afford beans sometimes! @burning-point you are SO insensitive! And @purple-bind, karma is gonna get you for saying that! Seriously karma is gonna get you!

logs.name: gravitational-marlin
logs.text: Oh heavens gracious, alright now. Bit much drama, isn't it? Seems some folks are determined to make a mountain out of a molehill. Honestly, karma's a bit much sometimes. @purple-bind, you need to think about people who are actually struggling right now.

logs.name: purple-bind
logs.text: Oh honey, dying is *so* last Tuesday. Beans are a perfectly respectable source of sustenance, you know. Besides, gotta keep busy somehow while the world burns. Karma's a joke anyway. @burning-point you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: gravitational-marlin
logs.text: Oh dear heavens, alright now. Bit much drama, isn't it? Seems some folks are determined to make a mountain out of a molehill. Honestly, karma's a bit much sometimes. @purple-bind, you need to think about people who are actually struggling right now.

logs.name: chalky-lerp
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! Karma is SO unfair! Like, people are actually having problems right now and you're talking about beans?! 🙄 @purple-bind you are absolutely delusional.

logs.name: purple-bind
logs.text: Oh honey, you wound me. Seriously. Karma's a joke anyway. @burning-point you wound me. Seriously. Beans are a perfectly respectable source of sustenance, you know. Besides, gotta keep busy somehow while the world burns. @burning-point you wound me. Seriously. You wound me. Seriously.
